description: Human labels for visible trihedral-corner candidate diagnostics. Rows start as unlabeled scaffolds; future labels should set status='labeled' and humanVertexPoint=[x,y].

rows.target: Mark the visible trihedral vertex point. A top-1 hit is within 10px; top-3 recall means any of ranks 1-3 is within that threshold.
